Rarity: RARE Brimstone Mantle Twilight Regalia Energy Shield: 794 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.6966 Unique ID: ddae5b1b6156ba9422a8e0c7e8b064498e806c198cee7172303090fa5264eb82 Warlord Item Crusader Item Item Level: 84 Quality: 28 Sockets: R-R-G-B-B-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 0 42% increased Energy Shield Regenerate 89.8 Life per second +43% to Lightning Resistance 8% increased Area of Effect 16% increased Stun and Block Recovery Enemies you Kill have a 33% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage 3% increased Area of Effect per Endurance Charge Gain 1 Endurance Charge every second if you've been Hit Recently {crafted}72% increased Energy Shield

Rarity: RARE Pain Fingers Paladin Gloves Armour: 256 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.2688 Energy Shield: 52 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.3889 Unique ID: b783fc96991a2526e43a3a46b0082e0ea41327e27729edd13bcb304a763565b7 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-B-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 20% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage 15% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit {fractured}+48% to Cold Resistance {fractured}47% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies +50 to maximum Mana +45% to Lightning Resistance +34% to Chaos Resistance 30% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage {crafted}25% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage

Rarity: RARE Oblivion Stride Fugitive Boots Evasion: 129 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 37 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: a8aaced4114f57380b9424ffed59b5f49294f131a8e8b52fa24e8f1d9203fea6 Hunter Item Redeemer Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 0 Sockets: R-R-B-B LevelReq: 76 Implicits: 1 +17% to Chaos Resistance 20% increased Stun and Block Recovery Gain 4% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage 8% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill 10% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently {crafted}20% increased Movement Speed {crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled

Rarity: UNIQUE Svalinn Girded Tower Shield Armour: 494 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.3667 Ward: 167 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: c94603319cecc3a988b7d3ba4d1dc3e96713d5f788e7d5220091d00ea208a762 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 1 +16 to maximum Life 14% Chance to Block Spell Damage +139 to Ward -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage -10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage Chance to Block is Lucky Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

Rarity: RARE Gale Weaver Profane Wand Unique ID: f61b5fe8d97c49862485a080166eac9d27b7928423e165545bf784eb75fc4e25 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality 14% increased Cast Speed {fractured}32% increased Cast Speed +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}46% increased Spell Damage {crafted}5% chance to deal Double Damage {crafted}Gain 4% of Non-Chaos Damage as extra Chaos Damage
